notes:
Bluetooth controls fixed + a new source.

BLUETOOTH: Your headset, car and lock screen now control narration — play/pause and skip a chapter forward/back — and it keeps playing with the screen off or when you leave the app. The phone's text-to-speech was producing the audio in its own process, so Android had nothing to send the buttons to; the app now anchors the audio to itself.

NEW SOURCE: Daisy Novel — romance, werewolf and more, via a clean fast API.

All of v2.23 is here too: Royal Road, Wattpad, Gutenberg, glass everywhere, droplet icon.

Please test with a real Bluetooth headset and let me know.
